0.text: Area of increased density in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

1.text: Compressive atelectasis with linear air bronchograms adjacent to the effusion

2.text: Bilateral posterobasal lung lower lobes fibrotic changes

3.text: Diffuse mild thickening of the peribronchial regions

4.text: Multiple indeterminate subcentimeter nodules in both lungs
